---
title: ""
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: custom-landing.css
    include-in-header: custom-navbar.html
    toc: false
---

::: hero-section
![](images/home_image.png){.hero-logo}

::: hero-quote
Ad astra per tabula
:::
:::

::: {#services .services-section}
::: services-header
## Services

My name is Peter, and plots are the currency connecting data with information and compelling narratives. My approach emphasizes repeatable, process-driven methods to compose creative communication to help organizations and individuals alike to feel fully equipped in making informed decisions.
:::

::: services-grid
::: service-card
[📊]{.service-icon}

### Statistical Consultation

Deep dive into your data challenges with rigorous statistical methods. From experimental design to hypothesis testing, I help you extract meaningful insights and make data-driven decisions with confidence.

::: service-tools
**Tools:** R, Python, Bayesian methods, causal inference
:::
:::

::: service-card
[📖]{.service-icon}

### Analytical Storytelling

Transform your findings into narratives that resonate. I craft compelling data stories that bridge the gap between technical analysis and human understanding, making complex insights accessible to any audience.

::: service-tools
**Tools:** R Markdown, Quarto, D3.js, interactive visualizations
:::
:::

::: service-card
[🎨]{.service-icon}

### Data Visualization & Design

Create beautiful, functional visualizations that reveal patterns and drive understanding. From exploratory analysis to publication-ready graphics, every visualization tells a story.

::: service-tools
**Tools:** ggplot2, Plotly, Observable, Tableau
:::
:::

::: service-card
[🎓]{.service-icon}

### Educational Services

Workshops, tutorials, and one-on-one mentoring in statistics, R programming, and data analysis. I make complex topics approachable through hands-on learning and real-world applications.

::: service-tools
**Topics:** R programming, statistical thinking, reproducible research
:::
:::

::: service-card
[💻]{.service-icon}

### Custom Analytics Solutions

Build tailored analytical tools and dashboards for your specific needs. From Shiny apps to automated reporting pipelines, I create solutions that scale with your organization.

::: service-tools
**Technologies:** Shiny, Quarto, APIs, cloud deployment
:::
:::

::: service-card
[🌐]{.service-icon}

### Remote Collaboration

Working as a digital nomad, I bring flexibility and global perspective to every project. Comfortable with async communication and distributed teams across time zones.

::: service-tools
**Approach:** Agile workflows, clear documentation, transparent communication
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {#about .about-section}
<div>

![](images/bio_photo.jpg){.about-image}

</div>

::: about-content
## About Me

My name is Peter Maximilian Fortunato.

I am from Kansas, the Sunflower State, whose motto is "Ad astra per aspera" or, "To the stars through difficulty". It doesn't have to be difficult, but rather tidy and organized, and the stars will align (more or less).

Here at Solplots, I am committed to enabling everyone to see data and stories for themselves, to reproduce and share insights that are not just actionable but also grounded in clarity and mutual respect.
:::
:::


::: cta-section
## Ready to transform your data into insights?

Let's discuss how we can work together to solve your analytical challenges.

[Get in Touch](mailto:peter@solplots.com){.cta-button}
:::

```{=html}
<!-- 
INSTRUCTIONS FOR EMAIL:
Replace "your.email@example.com" in the [Get in Touch] link above with your actual email address.
For example: [Get in Touch](mailto:solplots@example.com){.cta-button}
-->
```
